description: Schema for structured extraction of key fields from business invoices, including parties, dates, line items, and totals.

buyer_name.X-ReasoningPrompt: Return the billed-to contact person's name. If the invoice is billed to a company with no named contact, return null. Do not use the company name as the contact name.

currency.description: Currency code used on the invoice (free-text, e.g. EUR).

customer_code.X-ReasoningPrompt: Return the customer or account code only if one is explicitly printed (e.g. a 'Customer code' line). If none is shown, return null; do not guess or reuse the invoice number.

discount_amount.description: Discount amount applied to the invoice.
discount_amount.X-ReasoningPrompt: Return the discount only if a discount line is present (use the printed value, typically negative). If there is no discount line, return null rather than 0.

due_date.description: Payment due date in ISO-8601 format.
due_date.X-ReasoningPrompt: Return the payment due date only if it is printed. If the invoice shows no due date, return null; do not derive one from the invoice date.

invoice_date.X-ReasoningPrompt: The invoice date is printed in European day/month/year order (e.g. 07/02/2024 means 7 February 2024). Return it in ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

line_number.description: Line number unique within the invoice, used to align item rows.

unit_price.description: Unit price for the line item.

purchase_order_number.X-ReasoningPrompt: Return the purchase order number only if a PO is explicitly printed. If no purchase order appears on the invoice, return null.

seller_vat_number.description: Supplier VAT or tax registration number (free-text).

tax_amount.X-ReasoningPrompt: Return the tax/VAT amount only if a tax line is present. If the invoice shows no tax, return null rather than 0.

tax_name.description: Tax label as shown on the invoice (free-text).

title: Invoice Extraction Schema
X-SystemPrompt: You are extracting fields from an invoice. Invoices often omit optional fields. Only return a value that is actually printed on this invoice; when a field is absent, return null. Never copy a value from a different field to fill a gap. Dates are European day/month/year and must be returned in ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).
